subcodes.first_line: O esteemed one! Thy graceful letter, resplendent with exquisite meanings and refined expressions, hath reached me, betokening thy boundless love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المحترمه قد وصل تحریرک البدیع المعانی اللطیف المبانی دال علی فرط محبتک
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of spirit and the kingdoms of existence, @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @The Holy Spirit, @the human soul
